description: Indonesian digital health platform offering telemedicine, pharmacy delivery, and laboratory services. One of largest digital health companies in Southeast Asia. Provides end-to-end healthcare services through mobile app.
business_model: B2C/B2B - Telemedicine and health services to patients and employers
competitive_advantage: Largest digital health platform in Indonesia, comprehensive services, government partnerships

varden_fit.rationale: Southeast Asian market - potential geographic expansion reference
